title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 in predicting drug properties, toxicity, and antibody generation. The model enables applications in drug repurposing, cancer drug discovery, and cell classification based on gene activity.
